project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with CLI, MCP server, REST API, and dashboard
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, no build step needed - pure Python
test_framework: pytest with class-based test grouping, fixtures, and unittest.mock
build_command: python -c "from augur.registry import AgentRegistry; r=AgentRegistry(); print(f'{len(r.get_all())} agents')"
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest tests/ - all 275+ tests must pass. 2. Import augur modules without error. 3. Verify no regressions in existing functionality.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/augur && pip install pyyaml (already installed). Source code at src/augur/, tests at tests/. sys.path insert src/ for imports.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11.15 available via pyenv. pytest 9.0.3, fastapi 0.136.3, click 8.4.0, httpx 0.28.1 installed.
contribution_requirements: snake_case variables, no mandatory new deps, fix/xxx branch naming, tests must pass, score range 0-10 clamped
key_patterns: Personas extend BaseAgent with analyze(ctx)->AgentResponse. DecisionCoordinator orchestrates. Tests use class-based grouping. CLI uses Click. Dashboard uses FastAPI+Jinja2.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - main package; src/augur/personas/ - 18 persona agents; src/augur/bots/ - telegram/slack/wechat/lark bots; dashboard/ - FastAPI dashboard; tests/ - pytest test suite; scanner/ - legacy mirror of personas
